description.content: Real-time game odds including spreads, moneylines, and totals

Returns real-time game odds for a specified sport and league, including spreads, moneylines, and totals from major sportsbooks. Supports alternate spreads, alternate totals, half-time lines, and winning margin markets.

query.description: League identifier (e.g. NFL, EPL, La Liga)
Specific game identifier for targeted odds retrieval

Player proposition odds

Returns player proposition odds for a specified sport including passing yards, rushing yards, receiving yards, touchdowns, points, rebounds, assists, hits, home runs, and other player-specific betting markets.

Season and championship futures markets

Returns futures odds for season and championship markets across thousands of markets including Super Bowl winner, NCAA Championship, NBA Finals, Stanley Cup, Premier League title, Wimbledon, US Open, and more.

Game schedules, results, and team information

Returns game schedules and results for a specified sport including home and away teams, game date and time, venue, final scores for completed games, and game status. Used to build game selectors and schedule displays.

Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

Wager API is a modern sports betting data platform providing real-time sports odds, player props, futures markets, and fantasy sports data. The API enables developers to build sports betting applications, bots, and predictive models with a single integration. Covers NFL, NCAA, NBA, MLB, NHL, soccer, tennis, and golf with real-time spreads, moneylines, totals, player statistics, projections, injury reports, and depth charts.
